news.headline: FBI nabs suspect in SEC Twitter hack boosting Bitcoin value by prematurely announcing approval of ETFs.
news.summary: Do you recall the incident involving the SEC's Twitter account being compromised to falsely announce the approval of Bitcoin ETFs? Well, the FBI has taken action and apprehended a suspect in connection with the hack.

news.headline: Metronet swiftly restores service after Hurricanes Milton and Helene, fully restoring gigabit speeds to multiple cities.
news.summary: Following the aftermath of Hurricanes Milton and Helene, Metronet swiftly mobilized crews to restore services in affected areas. The company worked in conjunction with local utilities to repair or replace damaged systems. As a result of these efforts, all system services have been completely reinstated, providing Tallahassee, Altamonte Springs, Apopka, Bunnell, Daytona, Deltona, Flagler Beach, Forest City, Maitland, Ocoee, Ormond Beach, Palm Coast, Pine Hills, Port Orange, and South Daytona with high-speed gigabit upload and download capabilities.

news.headline: HTEC partners with MetConnections to develop AI-assisted connections app for real-time interactions.
news.summary: HTEC, a digital engineering services company based in San Mateo, California, has revealed a new collaboration with MetConnections, an app promoting real-time connections. Through advanced AI technology, MetConnections offers personalized matching recommendations for individuals nearby, encouraging face-to-face interactions. The partnership will involve HTEC's engineering, product, and design teams working closely with MetConnections to enhance the app's capabilities. This partnership aims to optimize the experience of users looking to engage with others in their vicinity.

news.headline: ECB Officials see a December cut very likely with the 2% goal nearer.
ECB Officials didn't discuss a 50 bps rate reduction this week.
ECB Officials see inflation at 2% in the first or second quarter.
Momcozy faces challenges with unauthorized video release but stands firm with new initiatives; Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: In response to unauthorized adaptation and release of videos from the company's collaborations with creators on social media, Momcozy recently issued an official statement in New York on Oct. 17, 2024. The incident has triggered public misunderstandings and confusion. There is a significant number of videos affected by this unauthorized activity, causing concern for both Momcozy and the creators involved. Momcozy emphasized the importance of respecting intellectual property rights and the need for permission before reproducing or distributing content. The company is actively working to address the situation and prevent further unauthorized use of their collaborations.

news.headline: John Moon appointed as president of LISC Green LLC to utilize GGRF funds for sustainable community development.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, John Moon was appointed as the inaugural president of LISC Green, LLC by the Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC). Moon, a renowned figure in climate finance and social investing, will lead the organization in managing the funds received from the federal Greenhouse Gas initiative. This move signifies a strategic step by LISC towards advancing environmental sustainability and leveraging Moon's expertise to drive progress in this critical area.

news.headline: Navigator Gas places $100 million in 5-year senior unsecured bonds in Nordic market at 7.25% annual fixed coupon.
news.summary: In London on October 17, 2024, Navigator Holdings Ltd. (referred to as “Navigator Gas” or the “Company”) (NYSE: NVGS), a leading owner and operator of the largest fleet of handysize liquefied gas carriers worldwide, disclosed the successful placement of USD 100 million in new senior unsecured bonds within the Nordic bond market. These newly issued bonds are set to reach maturity in October 2029 and will carry a fixed coupon rate of 7.25% annually, with payments made semi-annually in arrears.

news.headline: Bitcoin whales have driven its price to $67K as exchange reserves hit a multi-year low, indicating institutional demand. Over 51,000 BTC withdrawn in past month.
news.summary: The amount of Bitcoin held in exchange reserves has dropped significantly to a multi-year low, indicating a rise in institutional interest. In the past month, a total of over 51,000 Bitcoin have been withdrawn from major cryptocurrency exchanges. This move has decreased the available supply of Bitcoin, suggesting that investors are adopting a more long-term approach. The decline in exchange reserves is attributed to factors such as the distribution of Bitcoin to creditors by Mt. Gox and a reduction in Coinbase exchange reserves. While this trend points towards increased investor confidence in Bitcoin, the current high price levels may lead to some investors taking short-term profits. This information comes from a report by CryptoQuant and has been cited by The Block. More detailed coverage is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Report: Global Virtual Events Market valued at USD 79.66 Billion, expected to grow at 19.7% CAGR during 2025-2030. Key players include Avaya, Microsoft, Cisco Systems.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on the Global Virtual Events Market projects significant growth from 2020 to 2030. Valued at USD 79.66 billion, the market is forecasted to expand at a CAGR of 19.7% from 2025 to 2030. This surge is attributed to the rising use of digital communication technologies. The report covers market trends, opportunities, and forecasts based on event type, end-user, organization size, region, and country. This information is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: AGI Saskatoon celebrates 10-year safety milestone with no lost time incidents, honoring employees in special event.
news.summary: Ag Growth International (AGI) in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, recently achieved a remarkable safety milestone at its manufacturing facility. The plant celebrated a decade without any lost time incidents, highlighting the commitment to workplace safety. AGI recognized this accomplishment with a special event and awards ceremony for its employees. The achievement underscores the dedication of the AGI Saskatoon team to maintaining a safe work environment. This milestone serves as a testament to the facility's adherence to safety protocols and procedures.

news.headline: Sirion named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for CLM for 3rd year. Reflects trust of leading companies. Download full report.
news.summary: In Lehi, Utah, Sirion, the AI-native contract lifecycle management platform, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) for the third consecutive year. This acknowledgment showcases the trust bestowed upon Sirion by the world’s top companies. To access the full report, interested parties can download a complimentary copy. The success of Sirion’s AI-native CLM lies in its adaptable foundation model, gaining the confidence of customers.

news.headline: Global board games market valued at USD 21.07B in 2023, expected to reach USD 41.07B by 2029 with CAGR of 11.77%. Rise of digitization and eco-friendly games noted.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Board Games Market - Focused Insights 2024-2029" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Board Games Market had a value of USD 21.07 Billion in 2023 and is projected to increase to USD 41.07 Billion by 2029, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.77%. The report provides detailed information on 30 vendors within the global board games market. Competition in the market is growing more intense, with a variety of products being offered by both international and local companies.

news.headline: Dr. Audra Spicer named as Provost and Chief Academic Officer of Colorado State University Global, driving student success.
news.summary: Dr. Audra Spicer has been appointed as Provost and Chief Academic Officer at Colorado State University Global (CSU Global), where she will oversee the academic strategy to enhance student success and maximize return on investment. The announcement was made on October 17, 2024, in Denver. Dr. Spicer's primary responsibilities include directing the institution's academic initiatives and ensuring the quality of education provided to students.

news.headline: Virbac reported strong revenue growth as of end of September with +12.6% increase, +8.6% at constant exchange rates. 2024 targets maintained.
news.summary: 1. Growth at constant exchange rates and scope refers to the organic increase in sales, excluding the impact of exchange rate fluctuations and significant changes in the scope of consolidation. This is determined by comparing the sales indicator for the current financial year with that of the previous year using the same exchange rate from the previous financial year.2. This adjustment accounts for the actual scope of consolidation, incorporating the effects of acquisitions such as Globion and Sasaeah. The calculation involves assessing the indicator using the exchange rate from the previous year to accurately reflect the impact of any changes in the scope of consolidation that occurred due to acquisitions.

news.headline: Allure Bridals introduces Spring 2025 collections for 6 brands in Memphis, TN, on Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: A renowned bridal designer, Allure Bridals, announced the launch of its Spring 2025 collections for its various brands including Allure Bridals, Allure Couture, Allure Romance, Madison James, Wilderly, and Abella. The unveiling took place in Memphis, Tennessee on Oct. 17, 2024. The designer is known for creating exquisite bridal and formal wear and continues to receive acclaim for their designs.

Star Group, L.P. declares quarterly distribution of $0.1725 per common unit for three months ended September 30, 2024.

The Company declared a distribution of $0.1725 per common unit for the period ending on September 30, 2024. Star Group, L.P. (NYSE: SGU) is a leading provider of home energy distribution and services.

news.headline: Top Canadian pension funds are borrowing internationally, diversifying investments for higher returns.
Artisan Studios partners with Spacelift to streamline AWS cloud resource management using Artisan Launchpad for automation and shorter product time-to-market cycles.
news.summary: Artisan Studios, a prominent technology solutions provider based in Asheville, North Carolina, unveiled a groundbreaking initiative called Artisan Launchpad in partnership with Spacelift. Spacelift is known for its orchestration platform designed to facilitate the comprehensive management of infrastructure lifecycles. Through this collaboration, the two entities intend to transform the process by which customers automate and provision AWS cloud resources utilizing infrastructure as code. The primary objective of this joint venture is to expedite product time-to-market cycles. This strategic alliance underscores Artisan's dedication to delivering innovative technology solutions.

news.summary: Want to finish the Pavel Durov puzzle on Telegram? Here's the solution for Major's daily puzzle on Thursday, October 17.

news.headline: Ascencio and Allego team up to install more fast charging stations in Belgium, boosting EV infrastructure.
news.summary: Ascencio and Allego have joined forces to expedite the deployment of swift charging stations across Belgium. This collaboration aims to increase the number of charging points throughout the country, with a target of adding at least 100 new stations within the next year. The partnership between the two companies signifies a significant step towards enhancing the infrastructure for electric vehicles in Belgium. This initiative is expected to greatly benefit both current EV owners and potential future adopters, providing more convenient and accessible charging options.

news.headline: Q3 earnings up by 1.9%, "functional unemployment" drops by 0.5% - Wages rise, but uneven growth in living-wage jobs.
news.summary: Wages experienced a widespread increase, with median weekly earnings rising by 1.9% in the third quarter of 2024. Additionally, the rate of "functional unemployment" decreased by 0.5% in September. Despite these positive trends, growth in living-wage jobs was uneven, indicating a more nuanced employment landscape. The numbers show a promising overall economic trajectory, with improvements in earnings and unemployment rates.

news.headline: SAS predicts AI specialization and sustainability in 2025. advancements expected in model specialization.
news.summary: In Cary, North Carolina, as of October 17, 2024, the spotlight remains on AI, continuing its dominance in tech industry forecasts. Is there a change in store for 2025? The answer is a clear no. Nonetheless, key themes in AI are expected to gain prominence, including model specialization and regulatory hurdles.

news.summary: Ahead of ServiceNow's third quarter earnings report on October 23, Bank of America increased its price target for the company's stock. The software maker is expected to release its earnings next week. The announcement was featured in Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Westhaven's brokered private placement raises C$6.0M, with C$1.5M from Rob McEwen.
news.summary: In the latest update, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This encouraging news comes as the number of new job creations surpassed expectations, with over 500,000 jobs added in the last month. The economic growth also exceeded projections, reaching an impressive 6.5%. These positive indicators suggest a strong recovery for the country's economy following the challenges posed by the global pandemic. Additionally, it was noted that the inflation rate remains steady at 2.7%, providing further stability to the financial landscape. These statistics reflect the resilience of the American economy and offer hope for continued progress in the coming months.

news.headline: Pharmerging market to surpass $7.1 billion by 2034 at 11.6% CAGR. Pharmaceuticals in demand for chronic diseases. Healthcare infrastructure investments rising in emerging nations. Telemedicine and digital health to reshape healthcare delivery. Innovative pricing strategies to reduce costs.
news.summary: The pharmerging market, with an estimated value of US$ 2.1 billion in 2023, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 11.6% from 2024 to reach US$ 7.1 billion by 2034. The increasing demand for pharmaceuticals to manage chronic diseases like diabetes, cardiovascular issues, and cancer, especially in emerging economies, is a significant driver. Factors like government and private sector funding, innovative pricing strategies, and the rise of telemedicine and digital health solutions are poised to improve healthcare access and affordability. The construction of healthcare facilities, including the use of modular techniques, is crucial for enhancing global healthcare infrastructure. Emerging economies transitioning in disease patterns are seeing pharmaceutical research and development as instrumental in their growth. Key players in this market include Abbott Laboratories, Roche Ltd., Novartis AG, Johnson & Johnson, and others. The pharmaceutical segment is anticipated to lead the demand in this market, particularly in areas like cancer and autoimmune diseases.

news.headline: Amazon AWS: Nvidia Blackwell is to be online early next year.
PuroClean jumps 38 spots to #154 on Franchise Times' 2024 Top 400 Franchises List.
news.summary: Property restoration and remediation company PuroClean, based in Tamarac, Florida, saw a significant increase in rankings on the 2024 Top 400 franchises list published by Franchise Times. The company is known for its expertise in addressing property damage emergencies. This recognition highlights PuroClean's success and position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: American Water (NYSE: AWK) supports the tenth anniversary of Imagine a Day Without Water, led by US Water Alliance.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, is backing the tenth commemoration of Imagine a Day Without Water. This initiative, led by the US Water Alliance, emphasizes the importance of water in our daily lives and urges people, communities, and policymakers to push for increased and fair water funding. The movement aims to raise awareness about the impact of living without water, a reality faced by many Americans.

Global trade credit insurance market valued at $14.9 billion in 2023 expected to reach $41.1 billion by 2033, growing at 10.7% CAGR.
news.summary: The trade credit insurance market was valued at $14.9 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $41.1 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.7% from 2024 to 2033. Factors contributing to this growth include the benefits of trade credit insurance solutions, expansion into new markets, and heightened commercial threats. Challenges include varying trade regulations and lack of awareness about trade credit insurance. Opportunities lie in the rise of small and medium-sized enterprises globally and the potential in emerging economies. Key segments covered in the report include components, enterprise size, coverage, industry vertical, application, and region.

news.headline: US 4-Week Bill Auction
Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. will report Q3 earnings on Nov. 7, with a loan principal of $383.3 million and 18.7% yield. Stocks up 0.06% to $15.79.
news.summary: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NASDAQ:REFI) will release its third-quarter earnings report on Nov. 7, 2024. The company reported a total loan principal outstanding of $383.3 million across 31 investments in August, and its weighted average yield to maturity decreased from 19.4% to 18.7% between March and June 2024 due to changes in borrower performance and pricing structures. Chicago Atlantic's shares were trading at $15.79, up by 0.06% on Thursday morning. They are a cannabis-focused commercial mortgage real estate investment trust based in Chicago.

This event is anticipated to attract numerous attendees from the community to participate in the empowering Leadership Summit.

news.headline: Ironclad named Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for CLM, excelling in Ability to Execute and Vision.
news.summary: Ironclad, a digital contracting platform for modern businesses, was recently acknowledged as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant for Contract Lifecycle Management for the second consecutive year. The recognition highlighted the company's strong performance in terms of Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. This announcement was made in San Francisco on October 17, 2024. The achievement showcases Ironclad's continued success in the industry, further solidifying its position as a top player in the market.

news.headline: New CLR Brands® Calcium, Lime & Rust Remover trigger sprayer eliminates measuring, mixing - now in spray bottle, joining iconic jug.
news.summary: Introducing the innovative CLR Brands® Calcium, Lime & Rust Remover in a user-friendly trigger sprayer. This updated version retains the efficiency of the original cleaning solution but now comes in a handy spray bottle, removing the hassle of measuring or mixing - simply spray and clean! Launched in Chicago on October 17, 2024, this product has gained massive popularity with hundreds of thousands of units sold.

news.headline: Coway launches new colors for compact Airmega 100 purifier line after winning multiple awards, expanding product line.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 17, 2024, Coway, a prominent wellness technology company, revealed updates to their acclaimed Airmega product line. The compact Airmega 100 model, which has been endorsed as a Wirecutter's Top Pick for a decade and honored at The 2024 Parents Kids' Sleep Awards, now offers new color options. Customers can now purchase the Airmega 100 in a refreshed range of colors, enhancing the aesthetic appeal of the product.

news.headline: Murray's Cheese partners with Sarah Jessica Parker's Invivo for exclusive cheese collection in Kroger stores.
news.summary: Murray's Cheese is introducing new wine and cheese pairings in Kroger stores nationwide starting this fall. The initiative, inspired by Sarah Jessica Parker's Invivo wine label, aims to elevate the classic combination. This collaboration promises to bring a unique culinary experience to customers, offering a selection of fine cheeses and wines. The new pairings will be available at all Kroger locations, aiming to cater to a wider audience. The launch date for this innovative endeavor is set for October 17, 2024. This initiative not only celebrates the richness of wine and cheese but also offers customers a chance to indulge in a sophisticated culinary experience.

news.headline: Campbell's partners with HBSE across 4 sports franchises: 76ers, Commanders, Devils, and Joe Gibbs Racing.
news.summary: In Camden, NJ, Harris Blitzer Sports & Entertainment (HBSE) and Campbell Soup Company revealed a new marketing collaboration. Campbell Soup, listed on NASDAQ as CPB, will be an official partner for four prominent sports teams in major leagues worldwide. The partnership includes the Philadelphia 76ers of the NBA, the Washington Commanders of the NFL, the New Jersey Devils of the NHL, the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ, and Joe Gibbs Racing in NASCAR. This multi-year agreement marks a significant development in the sports marketing landscape.
